title: Trump administration to withhold $259M in Minnesota Medicaid funds, citing fraud
author: Matt Viser, Dan Diamond
fullText: The move, announced by Vice President JD Vance, targets alleged health care fraud and signals a broader crackdown that could extend to other states.
summary: The move, announced by Vice President JD Vance, targets alleged health care fraud and signals a broader crackdown that could extend to other states.
